name: Chocolate Turtle Cheese Cake--Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Put melted margarine in a 9-inch round glass or plastic cake pan.
2. Stir in crumbs and press evenly on the bottom of the pan.
3. Put caramels in a 1-quart casserole dish with evaporated milk.
4. Microwave until melted, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Pour caramel mixture over the crust and press pecan pieces into it. Refrigerate.
6. In a large glass mixing bowl, combine softened cream cheese (microwave at 50% for 3-3.5 minutes) with half of the chocolate chips.
7. Add sugar and vanilla; blend with an electric mixer.
8. Add eggs and blend.
9. Pour the mixture over the caramel layer in the cake pan.
10. Microwave on high, rotating the pan twice during baking, for 10-11 minutes, until the center jiggles slightly.
11. Cool and refrigerate.
12. Combine remaining chocolate chips and milk in a 2-cup glass measure; microwave at full power for 1-2 minutes until melted.
13. Stir until smooth and spread over the cheesecake.
14. Top with pecan halves.
NOTE: Assembled cheesecake can be baked in a pre-heated conventional oven at 350°F for 40 minutes.
